phrases.intent_en: Is this train going to Ventimiglia?
phrases.cultural_note: Menton–Ventimiglia crossings are common; verify destination and stops before boarding.

phrases.intent_en: What time is the next train to Nice?
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est le prochain train pour Nice ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR eh luh pro-SHEN trahn poor neess
phrases.cultural_note: Regional trains to Nice run frequently but can get crowded in peak beach hours.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy a TER ticket?
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter un billet TER ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo pwee-zh ah-shuh-TAY uhn bee-YAY tay-air
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket machines may have language options; counters can have limited hours.

responses.english: At the machine, on the platform.

phrases.text_local: Je dois aller sur quel quai ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh dwah zah-LAY sur kel kay
phrases.cultural_note: Platform changes can happen close to departure time—watch screens and announcements.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the bus stop for old town?
phrases.text_local: L'arrêt de bus pour la vieille ville est où ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah-RAY duh bewss poor lah vee-EY veel eh oo
phrases.cultural_note: Old town access often combines short bus ride + uphill walk.

responses.phonetic: ah lah sor-TEE, toor-NAY ah DRWAHT
responses.local: À la sortie, tournez à droite.
